Interface ILockInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply lock information.

[Guid("4FC115FB-1C7F-47AF-9AD8-46B9E98646C5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILockInfo2 : ILockInfo

Properties

BranchID

The branch id of the lock.

int BranchID { get; }

Property Value

int

int BranchLockType { get; }

int

int
